info.title: squeal
info.description: A .NET tool used to run SQL Server database migrations and scripts during deployments.

commands.name: run
commands.description:
Runs a named script against the target
database.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --script
options.description: The name of the script to run

options.name: --parameter
options.description:
Pass a parameter to the script. Format:
PARAM=VALUE, Replaces ${PARAM} in the
script.

options.name: --path
options.description: The base path (defaults to current dir)

options.name: --connection-string
options.description: The connection string. Overrides squeal.json

options.name: --aad-tenant-id
options.description:
The Azure AD Tenant (used for Service
Principal authentication). Overrides
squeal.json

options.name: --aad-client-id
options.description:
The Azure AD ClientId (used for Service
Principal authentication). Overrides
squeal.json

options.name: --aad-client-secret
options.description:
The Azure AD ClientId (used for Service
Principal authentication). Overrides
squeal.json

commands.name: up
commands.description:
Runs database migrations against the target
database.
Run 'squeal [command] --help' for more information about a command.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --target-migration
options.description:
The migration ID to update/rollback the
database to

options.name: --path
options.description: The base path (defaults to current dir)

options.name: --connection-string
options.description: The connection string. Overrides squeal.json

options.name: --aad-tenant-id
options.description:
The Azure AD Tenant (used for Service
Principal authentication). Overrides
squeal.json

options.name: --aad-client-id
options.description:
The Azure AD ClientId (used for Service
Principal authentication). Overrides
squeal.json

options.name: --aad-client-secret
options.description:
The Azure AD ClientId (used for Service
Principal authentication). Overrides
squeal.json
